codeList:
# new-values.yaml
minio:
  resources:
     limits:
       cpu: 2
       memory: 8Gi
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yam;
minio:
  zones: 2
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
kafka:
  resources:
     limits:
        cpu: 2
        memory: 12Gi
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
kafka:
  replicaCount: 4
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
pulsar:
  broker:
    resources:
       limits:
         cpu: 4
         memory: 16Gi
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
pulsar:
  bookkeeper:
    resources:
       limits:
         cpu: 4
         memory: 16Gi
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
pulsar:
  bookkeeper:
    volumes:
      journal:
        size: 20Gi
        storageClassName: gp3
# new-values.yaml
pulsar:
  broker:
    replicaCount: 3
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
pulsar:
  bookkeeper:
    replicaCount: 3
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
etcd:
  resources:
     limits:
       cpu: 2
       memory: 8Gi
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus
# new-values.yaml
etcd:
  replicaCount: 5
helm upgrade <milvus-release> --reuse-values -f new-values.yaml milvus/milvus

anchorList.label: Meningkatkan sumber daya per pod MinIO
Tingkatkan sumber daya per pod broker Kafka
Meningkatkan sumber daya per pod broker Pulsar
Tingkatkan sumber daya per pod bandar Pulsar
Tambahkan sebuah pod bandar Pulsar tambahan (Disarankan)
Meningkatkan sumber daya per pod etcd (disarankan)
